notes: Initial skill registry covering only the two shipped B2 lessons. Skills are deliberately narrow: each one is a single rule decision, defensible in one sentence, and supported by ≥10 items of evidence in the shipped bank. Do not extend by adding broad vague skills — extend by adding the skill the next shipped lesson actually teaches.

skills.title: Verb + -ing after gerund-taking verbs
skills.description: After enjoy, avoid, suggest, mind, keep, finish (and consider in this cluster), the next verb takes the -ing form, not to + infinitive.

skills.title: Present perfect continuous vs simple
skills.description: Choose have/has been + verb-ing when the focus is duration or an ongoing action, and have/has + past participle when the focus is a completed result.
